response.step_by_step_log: Identified the main song from the on-screen text '電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言'. Confirmed performers are Hololive 1st Generation. Performed search for '電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言' lyrics in Japanese and English. Mapped the timeline to intro, performance, and outro scenes.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance of the Hololive 1st Generation song "電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言" (Denno Pure Oshi Daiseigen) at a concert event. The video includes an intro, the full performance, and a post-performance discussion.

scenes.description: Intro screen displaying '1st generation' and '電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言'.
Hololive 1st Generation members (Shirakami Fubuki, Akai Haato, Natsuiro Matsuri, Aki Rosenthal) perform '電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言'.
scenes.song_title: 電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
は～い、これから配信始めるよ
みんな観てる? 今回はコラボ配信
あれ? あれれ? コメントの熱量、
なんだか少なくない?
まだまだ足りないっ

(Lyrics follow the standard song structure...)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, I'm starting my stream now, is everyone watching?
This time it's a collaboration stream. Huh? Huh?
Is the heat of the comments, a bit low?
Still not enough! Something like this...

(Lyrics follow the standard song structure...)

scenes.description: Post-performance talk and self-introductions by the members.
